name: Hunter Ryx
dialogue: Followed you all the way to the snow.
Lost in the dojo. Master Kenji's still in my head. I won't end the journey on that.
Out here in the cold I'm sharper. Built my pack from the ground up. Five mons. Real ones.
One more fight. Whoever wins this is the better hunter — for keeps.
postDefeatDialogue: Heh. You always were ahead of me.
Take this — it's yours. You earned every step.
